## Xenium

### preamble

```{r load-libs}
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(SpatialData)
library(SpatialData.data)
library(SpatialData.plot)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
```

```{r load-data}
(sd <- JanesickBreastXeniumRep1())
```

### analysis

```{r}
# bounding box crop
bb <- list(xmin=4e3, xmax=12e3, ymin=8e3, ymax=12e3)
(sp <- crop(sd, bb))
```

```{r}
# TODO: make this better...
i <- "cell_boundaries"
t <- SpatialData::table(sd)
region(t) <- i
table(sp, "tmp") <- t
base::table(getTable(sp, i, "celltype_major"))
```

```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=5}
plotSpatialData() + 
    plotShape(sp, i, col=NA, fill="transcript_counts") +
    plotPoint(sp, size=0.2, n=2e4, key="EPCAM", col="red") +
    scale_fill_gradientn(colors=hcl.colors(9, "Roma"), trans="log10")
```

### appendix

::: {.callout-note icon=false, collapse=true}

### session

```{r sess-info}
sessionInfo()
```

:::
